channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Colorblind Constitution Is Not Just a Partisan Pet Project
item.description: A Washington Post essay highlights an important concept but falls short.

item.title: The Muslim Brotherhood and Our Fifth Column
item.description: Two data points from this past week alone compel us to closely examine, once more, the role and reach of the Islamist organization.

item.title: Making Crazy Horse: The Role of a Lifetime
item.description: Majestic art in the Badlands, a compelling vision, what a subject, what an artist.

item.title: China's Reusable Rocket Breakthrough Demands a Private Space Response
item.description: Keeping our global advantage in space requires that the U.S. open the door to innovation without time-consuming red tape.
